CustomField.formula: IF( VAT_16__c >= 1000000000, TEXT(FLOOR(VAT_16__c / 1000000000)) & "," & RIGHT(TEXT(FLOOR((VAT_16__c / 1000000) - (FLOOR(VAT_16__c / 1000000000) * 1000))), 3) & "," & RIGHT(TEXT(FLOOR(VAT_16__c / 1000)), 3) & "," & RIGHT(TEXT(FLOOR(VAT_16__c)), 3), IF( VAT_16__c >= 1000000, TEXT(FLOOR(VAT_16__c / 1000000)) & "," & RIGHT(TEXT(FLOOR(VAT_16__c / 1000)), 3) & "," & RIGHT(TEXT(FLOOR(VAT_16__c)), 3), IF( VAT_16__c >= 1000, TEXT(FLOOR(VAT_16__c / 1000)) & "," & RIGHT(TEXT(FLOOR(VAT_16__c)), 3), TEXT(FLOOR(VAT_16__c)) ) ) ) & "." & LPAD(TEXT((Amount__c - FLOOR(VAT_16__c)) * 100), 2, "0")
CustomField.label: VAT 16 T
